mnemonics.title: Eulerian Even Edges
mnemonics.content: Eulerian circuits require Even degrees on Every vertex

mnemonics.title: Hamiltonian Hard
mnemonics.content: Hamiltonian problems are Hard (NP-complete) while Eulerian are Easy

mnemonics.title: Two Odd Trail
mnemonics.content: For Eulerian path (not circuit): Exactly Two vertices with Odd degree makes a Trail
